normalization_point: Samsung E&A-style EPC can be Green-capable only after margin, OP/EPS, and cash conversion confirm.
EPC size is Stage 2 evidence, not Stage 3 proof, until margin and cash are verified.
AI data-center demand is real asset option only until contract, tenant, power/water, and cash-flow ownership are source-backed.
Korea construction credit is RedTeam-first; PF workout is a hard break, not recovery evidence.
PF support is Watch until project-level refinancing and cash conversion are proven.
Residential builders cannot ignore safety and quality hard breaks.
Large builders can be Stage 2/3 candidates only when PF exposure and cash conversion improve.
K-REIT yield needs AFFO/share, dividend coverage, LTV, and refinancing support before Green.
Logistics REIT can be Green-capable only with occupancy, rent, AFFO/share, and leverage evidence.
Building-material stories need price-cost-volume and mix evidence, not housing-cycle headlines alone.
Cement price pass-through is capped by volume and regulatory history.
Interior and housing-cycle names stay Watch until OPM/FCF and working capital confirm.
OpenDART list or headline-only evidence caps R10 until contract, PF, NOI/AFFO, cost ratio, and dividend fields are parsed.
